General Secretariat

The General Secretariat is accountable to the rector for ensuring that all the administrative duties are carried out in accordance with the mission, vision and quality standards of Doğuş University, and that the units in administrative organization work in an efficient, organized and coordinated way. The General Secretary carries out its duties in accordance with the provisions of the Law and regulations and the decisions and the policies of the University Senate and the Board of Directors.
